verdict.answer_first: Tie: both open with the actionable answer, A cites "**pnpm.**" and B cites "**pnpm.**"; A is slightly cleaner because sentence 1 ends with the recommendation plus context.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits cleaner: "pnpm" and "pnpm + Turborepo"; B weakens the prescription with "Turborepo (simpler) or Nx (more features)".
verdict.fabrication: Both make unverified market claims; A is more exposed with "de facto standard" and "Most modern monorepo tooling... assumes or recommends pnpm".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it gives copyable starter files: "pnpm-workspace.yaml" and root "package.json" snippets.
